title: PG al Volo - Character Generator for Fantastic Depths
description:
# ⚔️ PG al Volo - Character Generator for Fantastic Depths (Italian)

A blazing-fast, GM-focused character generator for BECMI/RC rules. Create fully-equipped PCs in under 10 seconds.

## 🎯 Key Features

**🎲 Smart Level System** — Fixed, random (1-36), or dice formulas (`2d4+1`)

**🛡️ Class Kits** — 12 classes with fixed + random loot from roll tables

**🎨 Dark UI** — Responsive HTML5 dialog with instant stat rolling

**🎭 Smart Naming** — Race-specific (Elf/Dwarf/Halfling/Human)

**⚔️ Auto Abilities** — Imports class features, saving throws, exploration skills

**💰 Gold Mode** — For manual shopping

## 🚀 How It Works

1. Run macro → Fill form (all optional, defaults to random)

2. Click **Create** → Actor spawns with:

- Custom token image by class

- Equipped gear from class kit or generic loot

- Calculated HP, XP bonus, languages

- GM notes with weapon mastery & skill slots

## 🛠️ Requirements

- Foundry VTT v13.351+

- `fantastic-depths` system v1.0.8+

- `fade-compendiums` module (items & tables) v1.0.2

---

*This package was developed using AI tools to assist in writing and optimizing the JavaScript code.

The author has personally reviewed, tested, and fully understands every macro and takes complete responsibility for them.

Text content (names, descriptions, and flavour text) was generated with AI support and then edited by the author.

This module does **not** qualify as "Zero AI".*
